request.description:
**Description**

Returns the versioned health status payload for the Northstar CSA API service. This endpoint is currently implemented as a POST route and returns the static service name, API version, and OK status used to confirm that the backend router is reachable.

**Path Params**

| Param | Type | Required | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| N/A | - | - | - | - |

**Query Params**

| Param | Type | Required | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| N/A | - | - | - | - |

**Body Params**

| Field | Type | Required | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| N/A | - | - | - | - |

**Description**

Returns the version root payload for the Northstar CSA API. This endpoint is currently implemented as a POST route and provides the same standard envelope used by the health route, including the API name, version, service status, message, and numeric status code.

**Path Params**

| Param | Type | Required | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| N/A | - | - | - | - |

**Query Params**

| Param | Type | Required | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| N/A | - | - | - | - |

**Body Params**

| Field | Type | Required | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| N/A | - | - | - | - |

**Description**

Calls the current Northstar CSA chat endpoint. The route is presently implemented as a POST endpoint with no request body parameters and returns the same standard service status envelope as the health endpoints. This collection documents the current route surface only; future chat request fields should be added here when the backend introduces a chat schema.

**Path Params**

| Param | Type | Required | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| N/A | - | - | - | - |

**Query Params**

| Param | Type | Required | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| N/A | - | - | - | - |

**Body Params**

| Field | Type | Required | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| N/A | - | - | - | - |
